title: Fake SBI Bank OTP verification email
description: Received an email claiming to be from SBI Bank asking to verify account by entering OTP on a linked website.

title: Unauthorized UPI transaction from account
description: Multiple unauthorized UPI transactions from my account totalling Rs 12,000 to an unknown number.

title: Fake KYC update SMS from HDFC
description: Received SMS asking to update KYC via a link or account will be blocked. The link leads to a fake HDFC login page.

title: Counterfeit Amazon shopping portal
description: Found a website impersonating Amazon India with products at 90% discount. Payment gateway collected card details.

title: Fake parcel delivery SMS with tracking link
description: SMS claimed a parcel is held and needs Rs 49 fee to release. Link asked for full card details.

title: PAN card used for loan application without consent
description: Received loan approval SMS for a loan I never applied for. PAN and Aadhaar appear to have been misused.

title: Instagram account taken over and used for scam
description: My Instagram account was hacked and used to send messages to followers asking for money via UPI.

title: Fake income tax refund email with malicious link
description: Email from income-tax-refund@gov-india.net asking to claim Rs 8,200 refund by entering bank details.

title: Malicious APK installed from WhatsApp link
description: A contact sent a WhatsApp message with an APK link claiming to be a new banking app. After installing, OTPs started going to another number.

title: Fake electricity bill disconnection threat via SMS
description: SMS threatening electricity disconnection tonight unless Rs 500 is paid immediately via a UPI link.
